introSection: Wild Mouse is a steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster at Cedar Point in Sandusky, Ohio, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Wild Mouse was announced in August 2022. Vertical construction began in November 2022. In early December 2022, installation of the track was completed.

Wild Mouse opened on May 6, 2023.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The cars are designed to look like mice, except for one which looks like a block of cheese.

fullText:
Wild Mouse is a steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster at Cedar Point in Sandusky, Ohio, USA.

Wild Mouse was announced in August 2022. Vertical construction began in November 2022. In early December 2022, installation of the track was completed.

Wild Mouse opened on May 6, 2023.



Orange track and yellow supports.

The cars are designed to look like mice, except for one which looks like a block of cheese.
